headline: JPMorgan Connect Coach Scaling to 17,000 Advisors — 90% Faster Sourcing
the_so_what: Scaling from 4,600 private banking advisors to 17,000 across Chase Wealth Management by year-end — with a 90% reduction in discussion-material sourcing time — transforms Connect Coach from a private bank tool into firm-wide infrastructure, the same pattern JPMorgan followed when it extended electronic trading from institutional desks to the broader franchise.
company_name: JPMorgan Private Bank and Wealth Management
source_name: JPMorgan Chase 2025 Investor Day — Asset & Wealth Management
summary: At JPMorgan Chase's 2025 Investor Day on May 20, Mary Erdoes (CEO, Asset & Wealth Management) confirmed the rollout trajectory for Connect Coach: already live for 4,600 private banking advisors, launched that same weekend to Kristin Lemkau's 7,600 Chase Wealth Management employees, and targeting 'about 17,000 by the end of the year.' Connect Coach delivers tailored outreach ideas, meeting prep and next steps, real-time market insights, and on-demand answers from internal experts — cutting the time needed to source client discussion materials by 90% (Investor Day slide 12). The scale of the rollout — from Private Bank to the full CWM network — marks a shift from proof-of-concept to firm-wide infrastructure. Harvard Business School, which made JPMorgan a required first-year case, said students concluded: 'J.P. Morgan's playing an entirely different game.'

key_stat.label: Reduction in time to source advisor discussion materials — JPMorgan Connect Coach (2025 Investor Day)

verified_claims: Connect Coach deployed for advisors — tailored outreach ideas, meeting prep & next steps, real-time market insights, answers from experts (Investor Day slide 11)
90% reduction in time to source discussion materials — Connect Coach (Investor Day slide 11)
Smart Monitor (Spectrum) for investors: 83% reduction in time spent researching a topic (Investor Day slide 11)
Guidelines for operations: +50% productivity improvement from automation (Investor Day slide 11)
Harvard Business School case study on JPMorgan AI — 'playing an entirely different game' (Investor Day slide 11)
_governance.notes: All claims sourced directly from JPMorgan 2025 Investor Day Asset & Wealth Management presentation, slide 11 (page 11/21). Source PDF verified by Haresh against the actual document. human_approved: Track 2 entry, claims confirmed directly from source slide.

landscape_context.peer_comparison: Morgan Stanley (scaled, 98% adoption), BofA (scaled, 30B interactions), Goldman (deployed, 46K employees)
